description: The decorative Mandelbrot SVGs in the note container are overlapping/colliding with the text on mobile viewports. This should never happen — padding, z-index, and layout should guarantee the SVGs sit behind/around the text without intersecting it. Scope: (1) locate the note container component (likely src/components/notes/* or a shared Note component); (2) figure out whether the SVGs are absolutely-positioned background decorations or inline siblings; (3) fix the collision via correct padding, container sizing, or repositioning the SVGs so they never overlap text content at any viewport width — but especially 375px mobile baseline; (4) verify across short and long note copy. Acceptance: at all viewport widths from 320px up, the Mandelbrot SVGs and note text do not visually collide or overlap. Mobile-first.
title: Mandelbrot SVGs collide with text in note container on mobile
